definition: The Guard member that gates entering a region — may I activate/enter this? Predicate = authorization/precondition; deny-outcome = hide | redirect | forbid (403) | cloak (404), where the 403-vs-404 choice (revealing whether the resource exists) is a security call made behind the guard provider. The routing-and-rendering face of access control.
usage: The access-control member (#178) of the Guard protocol. Prior art: Angular canActivate, Vue route enter, CASL <Can> (rendering).
